    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private Map<ConnectionToClient, String>
    ServerController.connectedClients
    A thread-safe map storing active client connections and their descriptive info strings.
    Methods in server with parameters of type ConnectionToClient
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected void
    ServerController.clientConnected(ConnectionToClient client)
    Triggered automatically when a new client connects.
    protected void
    ServerController.clientDisconnected(ConnectionToClient client)
    Triggered when a client disconnects normally.
    protected void
    ServerController.clientException(ConnectionToClient client, Throwable exception)
    Triggered when a client connection is lost due to an exception.
    void
    Command.execute(Object data, ConnectionToClient client)
    Executes the specific logic associated with a client request. * @param data The data payload sent by the client, which may be cast to specific message or entity types depending on the implementation.
    private void
    ServerController.handleDisconnection(ConnectionToClient client, String type)
    Internal helper method to process client removals from the tracking map and UI.
    protected void
    ServerController.handleMessageFromClient(Object msg, ConnectionToClient client)
    Core message handler for all incoming data from clients.

    Hook method called each time a client disconnects.

    Method called each time a client connection is disconnected.

    Hook method called each time a client disconnects.
    protected void
    AbstractServer.clientException(ConnectionToClient client, Throwable exception)
    Hook method called each time an exception is thrown in a ConnectionToClient thread.
    protected final void
    AdaptableServer.clientException(ConnectionToClient client, Throwable exception)
    Hook method called each time an exception is raised in a client thread.
    protected void
    ObservableOriginatorServer.clientException(ConnectionToClient client, Throwable exception)
    Method called each time an exception is raised by a client connection.
    protected void
    ObservableServer.clientException(ConnectionToClient client, Throwable exception)
    Hook method called each time an exception is raised in a client thread.
    protected abstract void
    AbstractServer.handleMessageFromClient(Object msg, ConnectionToClient client)
    Handles a command sent from one client to the server.

    AdaptableServer.handleMessageFromClient(Object msg, ConnectionToClient client)
    Handles a command sent from the client to the server.

    ObservableOriginatorServer.handleMessageFromClient(Object message, ConnectionToClient client)
    This method is used to handle messages coming from the client.
    protected void
    ObservableServer.handleMessageFromClient(Object message, ConnectionToClient client)
    This method is used to handle messages coming from the client.

    AbstractServer.receiveMessageFromClient(Object msg, ConnectionToClient client)
